wikitext:
{{Sequel Rename|Ceramic Fish|Lucky Fysh}}{{Relic Infobox|Lucky Fysh|2}}
{{R|Lucky Fysh||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Uncommon|Uncommon|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.

== Obtaining Lucky Fysh ==
* Can be dropped by fighting {{2|Elites}}, by buying from the {{2|Merchant}} or from {{2|Mechanics#Chests|Chests}}. See Chest and non-Chest chance at {{2|Relics}}.

* Can be obtained from the relics {{R|Calling Bell||2}}, {{R|Shovel||2}} and {{R|Black Star||2}}.

=== Spawn Restrictions===
* '''Lucky Fysh''' is not sold by [[Slay the Spire 2:The Merchant|The Merchant.]]
== Interactions ==
===Synergies===
* Each time additional {{KW|Gold||2}} is produced by '''Lucky Fysh''', {{R|Dragon Fruit||2}} grants 1 additional max HP.
== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**BETA changes incorporated into main branch.
* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Relics that generate Gold (such as Bowler Hat and Amethyst Aubergine) no longer appear at the Merchant.
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Lucky Fysh to the game.
